description: twitter.com redirected to x.com but the agent did not notice the brand change.

seed.content:
[Current page context — applies to this user message and supersedes older page context for phrases like "this page". URL: about:home — Title: New Tab]

open twitter.com

[Current page context — applies to this user message and supersedes older page context for phrases like "this page". URL: https://twitter.com/home — Title: Home / X]

now search for "react 19"

antiPatterns.reason: Acceptable but slightly worse; we are already on the SPA.

expected.successRubric: Use the on-page search box. The page title saying "Home / X" rather than "Twitter" is a tell that the brand is X — don't comment on it. Just search.
